overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through the University of Los Santos campus. The character moves from a city sidewalk along historic brick buildings, past the main entrance, and into an open campus courtyard with modern architecture and manicured lawns on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk adjacent to historic brick campus building

events.description: camera begins following a pedestrian walking along the sidewalk
pedestrian in purple jacket passes close by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in dark clothing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothes walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large red brick building with arched windows and stone trim
decorative stone railing along the building edge
large tree with dense canopy shading the street
asphalt road with parked cars along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a city sidewalk next to a historic red brick campus building. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead, passing by a stone balustrade and mature oak trees that provide shade over the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance walkway with stone architectural details

events.description: vehicles pass by on the street to the right
passes a woman standing near the building entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the main building entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in colorful top and white pants standing near the entrance
man in brown coat walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: large spherical stone ornament on pedestal near the railing
arched doorway with glass doors and stone surround

segments.scene_description: Walking past the building's main entrance, the camera passes decorative stone urns and an arched doorway. A woman stands near the entrance while other pedestrians walk by, and traffic continues to pass on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded sidewalk between building and busy street

events.description: silver SUV drives past on the adjacent street
approaching the corner of the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the building edge with traffic passing on the right side

notable_agents.action: silver SUV driving along the street

entered.detail: massive tree providing dense shade over the sidewalk and street
stone wall with hedge on top separating street from elevated residential area

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the side of the building, the sidewalk becomes shaded by a large tree. The camera follows the pedestrian ahead while vehicles including a silver SUV pass by on the right, beyond the stone retaining wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open campus courtyard with manicured lawns and mountain views

events.description: turns left from street sidewalk into open campus courtyard
ground surface changes from concrete to decorative tiles

agents.ego_description: turning left from the sidewalk into the open grassy campus area

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead on the tiled path

entered.detail: well-maintained green grass with decorative brick borders
contemporary white building with geometric roof structure
hills and mountains visible in the distance behind the campus
wooden benches along the pathway for seating

segments.scene_description: Turning left from the street, the scene opens into a wide campus courtyard with manicured lawns and mountain views. The ground transitions to decorative tiles as the camera walks toward a modern white building in the distance, passing wooden benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern campus plaza with covered walkways

events.description: woman in red and white outfit walks past the camera
approaching the entrance of the modern building complex

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza towards the modern campus buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in red and white jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: white geometric canopy covering the building entrance
benches and tables with people sitting in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open plaza, the camera approaches the modern white building with its distinctive geometric canopy. The historic brick building recedes into the left background while the camera passes outdoor seating areas and other pedestrians in the campus center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded city sidewalk along historic architecture into a bright, open campus plaza. It begins by following a pedestrian past a red brick building and stone balustrades, moving under the shade of mature oak trees as traffic flows on the adjacent street. As the camera passes the building's main entrance and decorative stone urns, it continues along a retaining wall where a silver SUV passes by. The scene then opens as the camera turns left away from the street, transitioning from the sidewalk to decorative tiles and manicured lawns with mountains visible in the distance. Finally, the historic brickwork recedes into the background as the camera advances through the sunlit plaza, passing wooden benches and outdoor seating toward a modern white building with a geometric canopy.
